notes: Oneironautics Inc., Portland OR (October 2003) · GARDEN TENDING / NEIGHBOR STORY. Ines Rocha solo, made in stolen evenings the same October she welded Estuary 3 over Labor Day weekend. Set in Corvallis, fall 1995 — the open-house flier on Camp Sweetgum's bulletin board is THIS garden's flier, with the misprinted date she kept because the fliers were free. The smallest thing the studio ever shipped.

shelf.label_subtitle: nine beds · one fall · the frost is coming
shelf.shelf_condition: bought new · the sleeve still smells faintly of the shrink-wrap · a pressed ginkgo leaf someone slid inside the case, not Olaf's habit, so whose
